title: Volteras Partners with EV Energy for Charging Data Sharing
content: UK-based EV charging software provider ev.energy has partnered with energy data platform Volteras to access real-time charging data from over 30 OEMs, including Mercedes-Benz and Stellantis. The collaboration aims to enhance smart charging, demand response, and grid-balancing efforts by integrating insights on battery health, state of charge, and charging patterns. Both companies highlight interoperability, energy optimisation, and user experience as key benefits, building on ev.energyâ€™s recent partnerships with Jaguar Land Rover, Zaptec, and the California Energy Commission pilot that demonstrated strong results from dynamic price signals.
author: Analysts Account
